title: FPGA-Based Quantum Control
description: Dive deep into Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) architectures for real-time quantum control. Learn how FPGAs enable low-latency feedback, pulse sequencing, and adaptive quantum experiments with nanosecond-scale timing precision.
learningObjectives: Explain FPGA architecture and why it is essential for quantum control
Design pulse sequencing systems with deterministic timing
Implement real-time feedback loops for adaptive quantum experiments
Analyze latency requirements and optimize FPGA-based control systems
Compare commercial quantum control platforms based on FPGA capabilities
